# LeBron James 2024-25 Season Summary

During the 2024-25 season, 40-year-old LeBron James continued to perform at an elite level for the Lakers, averaging 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists across 71 games while earning his selection to the All-Star team. His consistent scoring output and playmaking ability demonstrated that he remains one of the league's premier players despite his age. James's well-rounded statistical contributions underscore his continued importance to the Lakers' success this season.
